objectTemplate.name: UserTemplate-Person-Base
objectTemplate.description: Template canónico base UPeU v2.1. Bloques A-H implementados. Schema: sciback:person (canónico) + upeu:local (LAMB). Libro Cap.9 compliant. Bloque H: ciclo ISO 24760 §6.3 active→archived.

script.code: if (givenName == null && familyName == null) return null def gn = givenName != null ? basic.stringify(givenName).trim() : '' def fn = familyName != null ? basic.stringify(familyName).trim() : '' return (gn + ' ' + fn).trim()
personalNumber != null && basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim() != ''
personalNumber != null && basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim() != ''

primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim() != '' && ['STUDENT','FACULTY','STAFF','EMPLOYEE','ALUM','AFFILIATE-CU'].contains( basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toUpperCase() )
def affil = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toUpperCase() : '' affil == 'STUDENT' && studentCycle != null

mapping.name: D-autoassign-br-estudiante-by-cycle
mapping.description: Auto-asigna BR-Estudiante-Pregrado/Posgrado/Doctorado según studentCycle. Opción A: lógica en base template.

script.code: def affil = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toUpperCase() : '' affil == 'STUDENT' && studentCycle != null

mapping.name: D-autoassign-br-docente-tc
mapping.description: Auto-asigna BR-Docente-TC a usuarios con primaryAffiliation=FACULTY. Diferenciación TC/TP pendiente de Fase 5 LAMB inbound. Opción A: lógica en base template.

script.code: def affil = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toUpperCase() : '' affil == 'FACULTY'

mapping.name: D-autoassign-br-admin-area
mapping.description: Auto-asigna BR-Admin-Area a usuarios con primaryAffiliation=STAFF. Opción A: lógica en base template.

script.code: def affil = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toUpperCase() : '' affil == 'STAFF'

mapping.name: D5-aux-archetype-student
mapping.description: Auto-asigna archetype auxiliar AuxAff-Student cuando primaryAffiliation='student'.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'student'

mapping.name: D5-aux-archetype-staff
mapping.description: Auto-asigna archetype auxiliar AuxAff-Staff cuando primaryAffiliation='staff'.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'staff'

mapping.name: D5-aux-archetype-faculty
mapping.description: Auto-asigna archetype auxiliar AuxAff-Faculty cuando primaryAffiliation='faculty'.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'faculty'

mapping.name: D5-aux-archetype-alum
mapping.description: Auto-asigna archetype auxiliar AuxAff-Alum cuando primaryAffiliation='alum'.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'alum'

mapping.name: E-assign-org-from-costCenter
mapping.description: Auto-asigna membership a OrgType (area.*) desde costCenter. costCenter = 'area.{ID_SEDEAREA}' inbound desde LAMB Trabajadores. OrgTypes preexistentes en 050-GobiernoAdmin.xml.

script.code: costCenter != null ? basic.stringify(costCenter).trim() : null
costCenter != null && basic.stringify(costCenter).trim().startsWith('area.')
def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : '' ls == 'draft' || ls == 'proposed'
def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : '' ls == 'draft' || ls == 'proposed'
def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : '' if (ls != 'draft' && ls != 'proposed') return null return 'BloqueG@UserTemplate-Person-Base'
def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : '' ls == 'draft' || ls == 'proposed'
terminationDate != null

mapping.name: auto-archive-after-termination-grace-period
mapping.description: Transición active→archived para staff/faculty 180 días después de terminationDate. Implementa el ciclo completo ISO 24760 §6.3.
